titleZh: Lely Luna电动牛体刷：提升奶牛舒适度与健康
summaryZh: 本文介绍了Lely Luna全自动电动牛体刷，该设备通过触控驱动、双向旋转和可变硬度刷毛，为奶牛提供类似按摩的刷拭体验，促进血液循环、减少寄生虫和皮屑，同时具有过载保护、低能耗和长寿命等特点。文章强调了该产品在提升奶牛福利、减少牛舍攻击行为方面的价值，适合规模化牧场作为改善动物健康管理的辅助工具。
featuredReason: 该产品虽非高度智能化，但体现了自动化设备在奶牛福利管理中的实用价值，适合关注动物健康与牧场自动化升级的从业者参考。
contentFull: BarnFor optimal cow comfortCow brush Lely LunaExploreIntroductionA compact and fully electric cow brush designed to optimize cow healthWhat if you could give your cows a present that is comparable to a wellness package; It's Lely Luna, that stimulates your cows' blood circulation, helps in the reduction of flies and parasites and exfoliates their skin. The Lely Luna brush offers optimum comfort for your heifers and milking cows, enabling them to treat their skin most effectively. Your ladies will love the brush and use it several times a day.USPMaximum cow comfortThe Luna cow brush is designed to pamper and care for your cows. Brushing not only improves blood circulation but also cleans dust and other dirt from the skin. This reduces itchy skin. Brushing is relaxing for the cows, and they will happily be brushed several times a day.The cow brush as a toyIt's playtime! Lely Luna is not only good for the health and skin of your cows, but it also encourages them to move. In this way it keeps them relaxed and calm with as a possible result more peace in the barn. Luna helps cows to relax and therefore there is less destructive behaviour or competition.Safe and easyCow safety is maintained through overload protection. If the cow pushes too hard against the brush, the brush stops moving. As a result, Luna prevents painful or irritated skin. Luna can also be easily installed in different ways. It works just as well as a standalone installation affixed to a wall.Long lifespanThe bristles are of durable material, and interchangeable when needed. Luna is 100% electric and energy consumption is very low. It’s an easy to install brush and thanks to its IP classification it can be mounted almost everywhere in the barn. The long lifespan comes with safety as well, thanks to its overrun safety protection.VideoThis is how the Lely Luna worksFeaturesLuna, a gift for your cowsThanks to its smart design the Lely Luna cow brush is driven by touch and rotates in the opposite direction once the cow pushes it. This ensures maximum comfort for the cow and a long lifetime of the brush. As the brush has two directions of rotation the bristles will keep their shape longer than those that have only one. In addition, electronic components are separated from the moving motor box. The Luna cow brush has spirally positioned bristles of variable thickness for maximum comfort and can easily be installed on a post or against the wall.Protection plateThe protection plate is there to keep the outer bristles of the brush straight for a long time. This ensures longer and better brushing for the cows as well as a longer lifetime of the brush itself.Red & black bristlesLuna bristles are black, and red. Black bristles are thinner than red ones and once a cow is grooming, a rotating brush with a mix of thinner and thicker bristles provides the cow with a rich brushing experience. It helps to ensure that old hair, dust and parasites are cleaned from cows' skin, that itchy spots are removed and that cows are more relaxed.Horizontal brush positionMost of the brushed areas for the cows are head, back and tail. A horizontal brush is a great solution since it is focusing on these hard-to-reach places. Brushing the side is less important because the cow can reach it with her tongue or tail. As observed, cows enjoy being brushed beneath their tails, by putting the tail over the brush. Such a brushing experience is less likely possible with swinging or vertical brushes.Maximum swingThe small rubber blocks under the electronic box stop the brush swing at 110 degrees. In this way cables and their connection are protected for a longer lifetime of these components.Brochure downloadDownload Lely Luna brochureDiscover the impact of our cow brush designed to optimize cow healthBrochureLely Luna cow brushDownloadFarming insightsWould you like to learn more about cow brush?Read more in our articles.Cow brush5/11/2026How mechanical brushing can support cow health, milk production and stress reductionMechanical brushes are increasingly recognized as a vital tool for improving cow welfare, far beyond basic grooming. The science behind brushing shows compelling benefits in stress reduction, physiological well-being and even productivity.Cow brush5/6/2026The Lely Luna cow brush: smart design, maximum comfortThe Lely Luna is more than just a mechanical brush, it is a carefully engineered enrichment tool designed to promote cow comfort, health and welfare. Built around natural behaviour research, the Luna helps cows groom effectively while ensuring safety, durability and minimal maintenance. Cow brush5/4/2026Why cows love to brushFor dairy cows, grooming is far more than a luxury, it is an essential behaviour linked to comfort, welfare and emotional balance. Many farmers are surprised to learn how strongly cows are motivated to scratch and brush themselves. In fact, controlled experiments have shown that cows will work just as hard to access a mechanical brush as they do to access fresh feed, underlining how important grooming is to them as a natural need. Cows experience itchiness, loose hair, parasites, dust, sweat build‑up and general irritation on different parts of the body throughout the day. Their instinct is to rub against trees, posts or rough surfaces. However, in modern barns these natural scratching objects are often unavailable. This makes a mechanical cow brush a powerful enrichment tool, one that allows cows to express natural grooming behaviour that would otherwise be restricted.Frequently asked questionsWhat dairy farmers ask about cow brushesWhat are the benefits of an automatic cow brush?An automatic electric cow brush helps improve cow welfare by encouraging natural grooming behaviour. Regular brushing supports skin and coat health, reduces stress, and can contribute to better cow comfort and overall herd wellbeing. A flexible cow brush, such as the Lely Luna, adapts to the cow's movements for a safe and comfortable brushing experience.What is the capacity of a cow brush?The capacity of a cow brush depends on factors such as herd size, barn layout, and how often cows use the brush. A single automatic cow brush can generally serve a large group of cows, provided it is installed in the right location. For larger herds or barns with multiple walking routes, installing additional brushes can improve accessibility and reduce waiting times.What is an electric cow brush?An electric cow brush is an automated grooming system that rotates when activated by the cow. It allows cows to groom themselves whenever they want, helping to remove dirt, loose hair, and parasites while stimulating blood circulation. Compared to a manual or fixed cow brush, an electric brush provides a more comfortable and effective grooming experience.What is the difference between a flexible and fixed cow brush?A flexible cow brush moves with the cow's body, providing consistent contact while reducing pressure and improving comfort. A fixed cow brush remains in one position, meaning cows must adapt their movements to the brush. Flexible brushes generally offer a better grooming experience and can encourage more frequent use, contributing to improved cow welfare.What is the price of a cow brush?The price of a cow brush depends on the type of brush, features, durability, and installation requirements. While a used cow brush may have a lower purchase price, it is important to consider maintenance, wear of components, reliability, and expected lifespan. Investing in a high-quality automatic cow brush can provide long-term value through improved cow comfort and reduced maintenance.Where should a cow brush be placed in the barn?For the best results, a cow brush should be placed in an area where cows naturally pass, such as near the feed fence, water trough, or walking routes. Avoid placing the brush where it may obstruct cow traffic or create bottlenecks. The right location helps maximize cow brush capacity by ensuring easy access for all cows throughout the day.Why do cows love a cow brush?Brushing is a natural behaviour that helps cows remove dirt, loose hair, and itchy skin while improving comfort. An automatic electric cow brush also stimulates blood circulation and allows cows to groom hard-to-reach areas such as the neck, back, and tail head. Because cows can use the brush whenever they choose, it supports natural behaviour and contributes to improved welfare.What parts of a cow brush require maintenance?An automatic cow brush is designed for reliable operation with limited maintenance. However, regular inspection of key cow brush parts, such as the brush segments, drive mechanism, bearings, and safety system, helps ensure optimal performance and a long service life. Keeping these components in good condition reduces downtime and allows cows to enjoy the brush safely every day.Image slider cow brushRELATED SOLUTIONSLuna works well withAstronautDiscovery CollectorMilkingProducing high-quality milk requires time and care. It requires making choices that fit in with you and your goals. Our solutions for automatic milking help you make the right decisions to attain those goals.ContactMore about milking with Lely
translationZh:
**牛体刷**

为最佳奶牛舒适度而设计

Lely Luna牛体刷

探索介绍

一款紧凑型全电动牛体刷，旨在优化奶牛健康

如果你能给奶牛送一份相当于健康大礼包的礼物会怎样？这就是Lely Luna，它能促进奶牛的血液循环，帮助减少苍蝇和寄生虫，并去除皮肤角质。Lely Luna刷子为你的小母牛和泌乳牛提供最佳舒适度，使它们能够最有效地护理自己的皮肤。你的“女士们”会喜欢这把刷子，每天使用多次。

**独特卖点**

**最大奶牛舒适度**

Luna牛体刷旨在呵护和照顾你的奶牛。刷拭不仅能改善血液循环，还能清除皮肤上的灰尘和其他污垢，从而减少皮肤瘙痒。刷拭对奶牛来说是放松的，它们会乐于每天被刷拭多次。

**牛体刷作为玩具**

游戏时间到了！Lely Luna不仅有益于奶牛的健康和皮肤，还能鼓励它们活动。这样能让它们保持放松和镇静，可能的结果是牛舍内更加平静。Luna帮助奶牛放松，因此减少了破坏性行为或竞争。

**安全且简便**

通过过载保护确保奶牛安全。如果奶牛用力过猛推挤刷子，刷子会停止转动。因此，Luna能防止疼痛或皮肤刺激。Luna还可以轻松以不同方式安装。它作为独立安装固定在墙上同样工作良好。

**长使用寿命**

刷毛由耐用材料制成，需要时可以更换。Luna是100%电动的，能耗非常低。它是一款易于安装的刷子，凭借其IP防护等级，几乎可以安装在牛舍的任何地方。长使用寿命还伴随着安全性，这得益于其超速安全保护。

**视频**

这是Lely Luna的工作原理

**特点**

**Luna，给奶牛的礼物**

凭借其智能设计，Lely Luna牛体刷由触摸驱动，一旦奶牛推动它，就会反向旋转。这确保了奶牛的最大舒适度和刷子的长寿命。由于刷子有两个旋转方向，刷毛比只有单一方向的刷子能更长时间保持形状。此外，电子元件与移动的电机箱分离。Luna牛体刷具有螺旋排列、粗细不同的刷毛，以实现最大舒适度，并且可以轻松安装在柱子或墙壁上。

**保护板**

保护板用于长时间保持刷子外侧刷毛的笔直。这确保了奶牛获得更长、更好的刷拭体验，同时也延长了刷子本身的使用寿命。

**红色和黑色刷毛**

Luna刷毛有黑色和红色两种。黑色刷毛比红色刷毛更细，当奶牛梳理毛发时，旋转的刷子混合了粗细不同的刷毛，为奶牛提供丰富的刷拭体验。这有助于确保奶牛皮肤上的旧毛、灰尘和寄生虫被清除，瘙痒部位被去除。
